message:
feat(doctor): expand lowering pipeline with constraint propagation, overflow inference, and runtime state-effect tracing

lowering.rs (+544 lines):
- Add constraint propagation pass that flows parent layout constraints
  (flex direction, alignment, overflow policy) down to children,
  detecting violations like flex:1 inside a non-flex parent or
  overflow:hidden inside a scrollable ancestor
- Add overflow inference: track the inherited overflow policy through
  the IR tree and emit warnings when a node declares overflow:scroll
  but its parent already clips (overflow:hidden)
- Add min-height / max-height constraint narrowing that detects
  contradictions (min > max) during the lowering pass
- New LoweringDiagnostic variants: ConstraintViolation,
  OverflowConflict, DimensionContradiction
- Tests for each new diagnostic path

state_effects.rs (+352 lines):
- Add runtime state-effect tracing infrastructure that records which
  state variables (hooks, signals, stores) each component reads and
  writes during a simulated render pass
- StateEffectGraph: directed graph where nodes are components and
  edges are state dependencies (read/write per state key)
- detect_state_cycles(): topological sort that finds and reports
  circular state dependencies (A writes X, B reads X and writes Y,
  A reads Y)
- detect_redundant_rerenders(): identifies components that read state
  they never use in their output subtree
- StateEffectReport: summary of total reads/writes, cycle count,
  redundant rerender count
- Tests for cycle detection and redundant rerender identification

composition_semantics.rs:
- Add variant normalization for conditional rendering patterns
  (ternary → if/else IR lowering)
- New tests for variant equivalence

ir_normalize.rs, style_semantics.rs, tsx_parser.rs:
- Single-line additions (new normalization hooks, style shorthands,
  TSX attribute variants)

ir_invariant_tests.rs:
- New test for lowering constraint propagation invariant

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
